title: Appraisal Authorization for 725 Harrison Street (Former Washington Irving School)
summary: Department of Assessment requests authorization to hire appraiser for 725 Harrison Street, the former Washington Irving School used as school district administrative offices. Building approaching its 100th birthday. Property was part of a 6-parcel RFP package issued approximately two years ago (3 for relocation, 3 for disposition); no transactions closed yet. Johnson Center relocated but redevelopment continues. Council members emphasize the building's historical significance as one of the last 15 historic school buildings in Syracuse.
